name: Los Angeles / UCLA, CA
jurisdiction: City of Los Angeles / LA County

documents.title: Plastic Bottles (#1 PET)
documents.instructions: Empty, rinse, and place in the blue recycling bin. Keep cap on.
documents.notes: LA accepts plastics #1 and #2 in curbside recycling.

documents.title: Aluminum Cans
documents.instructions: Empty and rinse. Place in blue recycling bin.
documents.notes: California CRV applies — redeem at a recycling center for cash.

documents.title: Cardboard & Paperboard
documents.instructions: Flatten boxes. Remove tape. Place in blue recycling bin.
documents.notes: Greasy pizza boxes go in the black landfill bin.

documents.title: Glass Bottles & Jars
documents.instructions: Empty and rinse. Place in blue recycling bin.

documents.title: Food Scraps & Compostables
documents.instructions: Place in the green organics bin if available, otherwise landfill cart.
documents.notes: LA is rolling out mandatory organics collection — check your address.

documents.title: Styrofoam / Expanded Polystyrene
documents.instructions: Not accepted in curbside recycling. Place in black landfill bin.
documents.notes: SB 54 may change foam rules — check current LA Sanitation guidelines.

documents.title: Plastic Bags & Film
documents.instructions: Do NOT place in curbside bins. Take to a store drop-off.

documents.title: Batteries
documents.instructions: Take to LA County HHW collection site or a retailer drop-off.
